top_signals.title: The Middle East war is testing the Gulf's ambitions to become an AI hub
top_signals.summary: Attacks on data centers in the Middle East and persistently high energy prices have altered the calculus for operators of the facilities, analysts say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs shed $1.26 billion in worst week since late January as ether funds see 10-day outflow streak
top_signals.summary: BlackRock's IBIT now holds $61.1 billion in net assets against $64.8 billion in cumulative inflows, a difference of roughly $3.7 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Why the Supreme Court's Chatrie case could change the meaning of privacy in America
top_signals.summary: Lawyer Adam Unikowsky spoke with Recorded Future News about why he believes geofence searches are problematic and why the way the court rules could have a dramatic impact on Americans’ right to privacy.
